scripts.bundle:ios: react-native bundle --entry-file index.js --platform ios --dev false --bundle-output dist/main.ios.jsbundle --assets-dest dist/ios-assets --sourcemap-output dist/main.ios.jsbundle.map
scripts.bundle:android: react-native bundle --entry-file index.js --platform android --dev false --bundle-output dist/index.android.bundle --assets-dest dist/android-assets --sourcemap-output dist/index.android.bundle.map
scripts.build: pnpm run bundle:ios && pnpm run bundle:android
